sca_or_equivalent.unavailable_tool_disposition: No dependency manifest, dependency version, package-manager script, lockfile, CI or release workflow, agent skill, fetched prompt, external tool install, executable generated content, or unknown supply-chain surface change is present in the BANDIT-043 implementation.

dependency_manifest_state.rationale: BANDIT-043 adds a local coordination-authority contract and validator without changing dependency manifests or package-manager scripts.

lockfile_state.manifest_rationale: No dependency manifest change is present.

rationale: BANDIT-043 touches local workflow coordination-authority policy, template, CLI validation, init/validate wiring, and focused tests only. It does not touch dependency manifests, lockfiles, package-manager scripts, CI or release workflows, agent skills, fetched prompts, external tool install paths, executable generated content, or unknown supply-chain surfaces, so no operator-supervised supply-chain approval is required before local-record landing.
